user.title: Connect to Pythonista Job Runner
user.description: Configure access to the add-on API endpoint.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Pythonista Job Runner
reconfigure.description: Update connection details without removing the integration.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the add-on endpoint

data.create_repairs: Create Repairs issues for connectivity failures

endpoint_unreachable.title: Pythonista Job Runner endpoint is unreachable
endpoint_unreachable.description: The integration cannot reach the configured endpoint. Details: {detail}. Open integration settings and verify host, port, and token.

auth_failed.title: Pythonista Job Runner authentication failed
auth_failed.description: The integration could not authenticate against the endpoint. Details: {detail}. Update the configured access token.

purge_jobs.name: Purge runner jobs
purge_jobs.description: Purge jobs from the add-on queue/history.

purge_done_jobs.name: Purge completed jobs
purge_done_jobs.description: Purge jobs currently in done state.

purge_failed_jobs.name: Purge failed jobs
purge_failed_jobs.description: Purge jobs currently in error state.

refresh.name: Refresh runner data
refresh.description: Trigger an immediate coordinator refresh for one integration entry.

cancel_job.name: Cancel job
cancel_job.description: Request cancellation of a queued or running job.
